transactions: 07/11 — Pittsburgh Pirates sent RHP Wilber Dotel on a rehab assignment to Indianapolis Indians.
07/11 — National League Futures activated CF Mike Sirota.
07/11 — Los Angeles Dodgers sent RHP Edwin Díaz on a rehab assignment to Ontario Tower Buzzers.
07/11 — Athletics placed 1B Nick Kurtz on the 10-day injured list retroactive to July 10, 2026. Right thumb capsule sprain.
07/11 — Tulsa Drillers placed CF Mike Sirota on the temporarily inactive list.
